docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $693.70 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT LIBAN,ESTER D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-20-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF AUG-13-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIBAN,ESTER D.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIBAN,ESTER D. $693.70 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $723.70, DEFENDANT ACKNOWLEDGED SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO ESTER LIBAN RETURNED, MOVED.
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $75.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $31.81 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LIBAN,ESTER D.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LIBAN,ESTER D.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LIBAN,ESTER D.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LIBAN,ESTER D.
ORDER OF COURT TO ASIDE TERMS TO ESTER D. LIBAN RETURNED MOVED NOT FORWARDABLE.
